name: oci-cli-workbench
description: Cross-platform AIDP migration and project delivery plugin driven by `.source` evidence, project-local `.az` Azure context, and local `.oci` OCI execution.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect `.source`, bootstrap `.az`, and build AIDP projects with local OCI CLI.
interface.longDescription: AIDP Migration Workbench helps Codex migrate or create AI Data Platform projects from mixed source evidence in `.source`, including SQL, notebooks, documentation, exports, and legacy artifacts from platforms such as Azure data platforms, Databricks, Cloudera, SQL Server, Oracle, or document-only requirements. It standardizes project-local Azure context in `.az`, can bootstrap Azure CLI readiness and inventory Azure data-platform resources before handing findings into source intake, then uses `.oci` and the local OCI CLI to plan, validate, bootstrap, deploy, and operate AIDP workspaces with reusable skills and guarded workflows.
defaultPrompt: Inspect `.source` and propose an AIDP migration plan.
Use `.source` and `.oci` to create a new AIDP project from source artifacts or requirements documents.
Bootstrap the local OCI CLI environment and validate the target AIDP workspace.
Bootstrap `.az` Azure CLI context and inventory Azure data-platform resources before shaping an AIDP migration manifest.
